title: New Year's harness
description: replaces the Happy Gast harness with a New Year's Christmas hat
body:
![New Year's harness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceb4e9de41c0a08df99be573fd87a379aeb428c7_0.webp)

![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cb24af972c703b54f4f1d0ac6f34096e57fc316.png) **this is a vanilla resource pack that was created for the New Year (for Christmas). It changes the Happy Gast's harness to a New Year's hat that also carries some of the style of the regular harness.**
![poloska](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb5a23d9aa754e615f86d589eabaa7b45adfb964.png)
![snac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e04e89260b8b6a17f20a2a80493dfb3a81169b1.png) **what's he doing!**
- It changes all the colors and textures of the harness items
- changes all the harness textures on Happy Gast
- he also changes happy ghast ropes

![heh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fcb388e192264a955a6b0eb6d8a82a39b8a34ea.png)  **Important note**

Happy New Year(: (And Merry Christmas)

![poloska red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbfe25557393799a58b6587cede25b2183f5a5c5.png)
![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0076017f3f98f4a5045a198ed3fb213ab7d60ca8.png)
